response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management — key requirements for this executive-level role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple published tools
Proven full-stack expertise across languages, platforms, and high-scale systems
Demonstrated mentorship through workshops, courses, and team collaboration
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, compliance, or risk management contexts
